MSG.NAME: [L2CAP][NEW_SIGNAL_TRANS] LINK_HANDLE=0x%x, can't find an available id then disconnect the link @l2cap_signal.c(128),WARNING
[L2CAP][NEW_ECHO_TRANS] LINK_HANDLE=0x%x, can't find an available id then disconnect the link @l2cap_signal.c(177),WARNING
[L2CAP][SIGNAL_TX_EXPIRED] LINK_HANDLE=0x%x, skip force to disconnect acllink->hdl=0x%x @l2cap_signal.c(289),WARNING
